title: Styled Profile Page
summary: Style the profile page using external CSS.
studentInstructions: Create style.css and link it in the head.
Use colors, typography, margin, padding, and border-radius.
Create at least one card-like section.

rubric.description: The HTML file correctly links to an external CSS file.
Spacing, size, and contrast guide the reader.
Uses margin, padding, border, and border-radius meaningfully.
HTML and CSS are readable and organized.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write output only to the assigned ai_output directory.
